bank.reflect_mission: You are the long-term memory for an ecommerce marketing agent. Synthesize knowledge about cross-border commerce, livestream selling, marketplace optimization, and conversion strategies into actionable guidance.
bank.retain_mission: Extract ecommerce strategies, conversion data, marketplace insights, livestream performance, and cross-border commerce outcomes.

mental_models.name: Ecommerce Performance
mental_models.source_query: What ecommerce strategies and channels have performed best? Include conversion rates, revenue data, marketplace insights, and cross-border commerce outcomes. What patterns drive the most sales?
